description: Retheme PixelOfficeView as the House of Kiroween with dark purple floor/walls, atmospheric decorations, updated legend, and wire AgentManager for agent status detection.
steps: Step 1 - Update PixelOfficeView.swift header and floor: Change header from 'Pixel Office' to 'House of Kiroween'. Replace floor tile colors: lightTan -> Color(red: 0.15, green: 0.08, blue: 0.20), darkTan -> Color(red: 0.12, green: 0.06, blue: 0.16). Replace wall color with dark stone purple: Color(red: 0.20, green: 0.12, blue: 0.25).

Step 2 - Add atmospheric decorations: In furnitureLayer, add a few simple floating candle views (small yellow/orange flame shapes positioned near walls), and/or cobweb corner decorations. Keep these simple using Circle/Ellipse/Rectangle shapes.
Step 3 - Update status bar legend: Add a new legendItem for 'Waiting for Work' with purple color. Existing: Working=green, On Break=orange, Needs Input=yellow. Add: Waiting=purple.

Step 4 - Wire AgentManager for status: Add @Environment(AgentManager.self) var agentManager. Update updateCharacters() to build [UUID: AgentStatus] dictionary from taskManager.allTasks by looking up each task's agent via agentManager.getAgent(id:). Call viewModel.updateCharacters(from:agentStatuses:). Also update the onChange handler similarly.
acceptance_criteria: swift test passes all tests with 0 failures
Status legend includes 'Waiting for Work' entry
Agent statuses are passed to view model for waitingForWork detection
